  1. Home

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: March 2026

Agreement

By using the services of The Royals Removals, you agree to these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before booking.

Quotations

All quotations provided by The Royals Removals are valid for 30 days from the date issued unless otherwise stated. Prices are based on the information you provide. If the actual volume or scope of the move differs significantly from what was described, we reserve the right to adjust the price accordingly, but will always discuss this with you before proceeding.

Booking and Cancellation

Bookings are confirmed once a deposit has been received (where applicable). Cancellations made more than 48 hours before the scheduled move date will receive a full refund of any deposit. Cancellations made within 48 hours may be subject to a cancellation fee.

Our Responsibilities

We will carry out your removal with reasonable care and skill. We are fully insured for goods in transit. In the unlikely event of damage caused by our team during the move, we will work with you to resolve the matter promptly and fairly.

Your Responsibilities

You are responsible for ensuring that all items are ready for collection on the agreed date, that access to both properties is available, and that any fragile or valuable items are disclosed to our team before the move begins.

Excluded Items

We are unable to transport hazardous materials, flammable liquids, perishable food items, pets, or any items prohibited by law. If you are unsure whether an item can be moved, please ask us in advance.

Liability

Our liability for loss or damage is limited to the terms of our insurance policy. We recommend that you arrange your own contents insurance for high-value items. We are not liable for damage caused by inadequate packing carried out by the customer.

Contact

For any questions about these terms, contact us at theroyalsremoval@gmail.com or call 07345 624506.

♛ The Royals Removals

Birmingham's most trusted premium home removals service. Stress-free, insured, and royal-grade care for every move.
